battle_awaken_20101_1.dlg: Utter to me what you think the ideal is.

battle_awaken_20102_1.dlg: I burn what I wish to burn.

battle_erosion_20102_1.dlg: It will… turn all to ash.

battle_awaken_20103_1.dlg: If it is fortune you seek—pray with all sincerity.

battle_erosion_20103_1.dlg: Speak unto me your wish… Vocalize your eagerness…

battle_awaken_20104_1.dlg: Such enchanting colors… The path is intent on thwarting all attempts to memorize it.

battle_erosion_20104_1.dlg: As a matter of fact, the alley is an open one.

battle_awaken_20105_1.dlg: I worry that this seeping rain may leak through the umbrella.

battle_erosion_20105_1.dlg: The air is too cold... and raindrops only grow thicker.

battle_awaken_20106_1.dlg: This is a portrait of theirs. Will you observe... a little closer?

battle_erosion_20106_1.dlg: Leave at once, interloper! Leave this place...!

battle_awaken_20107_1.dlg:
I shall feel the ponderous mass of the gun barrel rest upon my viscera.
Let this accursed bullet pierce through them...!

battle_erosion_20107_1.dlg: There is neither; no fragments of memories, no need to look into them... fire, only fire!

battle_awaken_20108_1.dlg: Fracture the present a thousandfold. Fracture the futures cast upon the shards yet another thousandfold. At long last, the ruined past shall finally lie shattered, the constitution of the universe in the wake of a singular, inevitable circumvolution—Trisāhasramahāsāhasra.

battle_erosion_20108_1.dlg:
May the manifold worlds of five hundred thousand
nayuta asaṃkhyeya be dyed anew.

battle_awaken_20202_1.dlg: This battle will conclude with victory.

battle_erosion_20202_1.dlg: Even if I must disgorge everything…

battle_awaken_20203_1.dlg: Pierce… to the profundities of the heart…

battle_erosion_20203_1.dlg: Come here… I’ll hug you tight…

battle_awaken_20205_1.dlg: It is now written. All that remains... is to set you free.

battle_erosion_20205_1.dlg: Truth, the truth is right before me... Heheh, Eheheheh, heheh!!!

battle_awaken_20206_1.dlg:
How does it appear, my form in your eyes?
Perhaps within the clockwork of time the answer lies?

battle_erosion_20206_1.dlg: Thus. You cease to move. Trapped in the stopped time. For eternity.

battle_awaken_20207_1.dlg:
Follow the predetermined path of the tale.
Be ensnared, for that is only right.

battle_erosion_20207_1.dlg: Get lost...! The apple, the apple...! Where did you hide it?!

battle_awaken_20208_1.dlg:
Do you recall the moment when you could breathe free for the first time?
For me... that moment is now.

battle_erosion_20208_1.dlg: Take a deep breath... For it will be your last.

battle_awaken_20209_1.dlg:
In this long journey, in times of restlessness,
search for hope and a future. Find your own answer.

battle_erosion_20209_1.dlg:
Execute Command: Meltdown. Walk across the dust,
grasp the solitude, and forge on toward the faint and far future.

battle_awaken_20210_1.dlg:
I may not be able to guide you into this flame-broidered starcloud...
But in my embrace, you may yet be made into a glint of starlight.

battle_erosion_20210_1.dlg:
Once more and yet again, until we touch the blazing haze...!
Together, we shall burn.

battle_awaken_20301_1.dlg: Gallop on, Rocinante! Justice shall prevail!

battle_awaken_20301_2.dlg: Onward, Rocinante! Again and again, until the dream is within our grasp!

battle_awaken_20303_1.dlg: Ho! I shall electrocute them all!!!

battle_awaken_20304_1.dlg: Salutations!!!!!! I implore thee to try this soup!!!!

battle_awaken_20305_1.dlg:
Now, let us make our wishes!
I wish for this rock to smite thee true and willing!

battle_erosion_20305_1.dlg: Thou must wish... with all thy heart... Lest misfortune... befall thee...

battle_awaken_20306_1.dlg: What color do thine eyes behold in this electric spark?!

battle_erosion_20306_1.dlg: Please stop... stop taking things away from me...

battle_awaken_20307_1.dlg:
Steeped in the blood of all... yes...!
Blossom in euphoria, blossom! Oh, blossom!

battle_erosion_20307_1.dlg:
You do not know of our thirst! I'll take your blood if I must...
and... and blossom... its crimson ever more profound!

battle_awaken_20308_1.dlg: Heheh! Thou art quite full of wishes... Which of them dost thou desire to see come true?!

battle_erosion_20308_1.dlg: Hooh... hopes, desires, all of these afflictions shall be broken...! And I shall liberate thee from their yoke!

battle_awaken_20309_2.dlg: Heed me, thou that art more azure than justice and more crimson than love…

battle_awaken_20309_3.dlg: In the name of those buried in destiny…

battle_awaken_20309_4.dlg: I shall make this oath to the light.

battle_awaken_20309_5.dlg: Mark the hateful beings who stand before us…

battle_awaken_20309_6.dlg:
Let your strength merge with mine,
so that we may deliver the power of love to all…

battle_erosion_20309_1.dlg: To those hateful beings that stand before my path…

battle_erosion_20309_2.dlg:
Nngh... beings that are neither good nor evil,
beings that deserve to be purged...

battle_erosion_20309_3.dlg: I shall show them the great power of love…

battle_erosion_20309_5.dlg: Someone has to fill the role of a villain. And that's you.

battle_erosion_20309_6.dlg: I am the chosen one… I’m not like you… I’m different!!!

battle_awaken_20401_1.dlg:
O.S.H.A.R.E.
(Obligate style hearkens aflame this robust earth.)

battle_awaken_20402_1.dlg: This flame, too, is artful ecstasy.

battle_erosion_20403_1.dlg: Time to serve as nutrition... Heh.

battle_awaken_20404_1.dlg: I've... always had my eye on you.

battle_erosion_20404_1.dlg: Turns out no one's come to save you... Kehehe.

battle_awaken_20405_1.dlg: Go on, open wide. Relax and cram this drink down your throats, heheh.

battle_erosion_20405_1.dlg: Starting to feel drowsy... aren't you?

battle_awaken_20406_1.dlg: I am the only one who moves in these waves. ... Shatter.

battle_erosion_20406_1.dlg: Sit tight... I'll skewer you with the fluorescent light!

battle_awaken_20407_1.dlg: Scatter. Every gaze shall be drawn to this squalidity.

battle_erosion_20407_1.dlg: Contempt...! Pulse, burst with this burning, piercing scorn!

battle_awaken_20408_1.dlg:
Resentment, penance... all of it, to no avail.
I was only reaching out to grasp onto something, anything.

battle_erosion_20408_1.dlg: I breathe in... and out... but it won't stop hurting...

battle_awaken_20409_1.dlg: The three severings: Reforge the past a thousandfold to cut it apart, retrace the future a thousandfold to rip it apart, rive the kṣaṇa of circumvolution another thousandfold. Sanzendaisekai (三千大世界).

battle_awaken_20503_1.dlg: I will pray for you, so that you shall surely break.

battle_erosion_20503_1.dlg: Before anyone else, you… shan’t pardon me.

battle_awaken_20505_1.dlg: This straight-jacket... isn't nearly enough to hold my violence back.

battle_erosion_20505_1.dlg: Head... turning into... metal... brain... flattened... Ends, Begins. ENDS, BEGINS!

battle_awaken_20506_1.dlg: This electricity is all I have left... I can't...!

battle_awaken_20507_1.dlg:
Blossom from the blood, O beautiful flower.
I shall gladly claim you as mine!

battle_erosion_20507_1.dlg:
More, more! This can't quench this scorching thirst...
Burst the dams...! Penetrate them with the roots!!!

battle_awaken_20508_1.dlg:
Steam compression piston pressure cap removed.
Observed temporal vector calculation complete...
Transform Accumulated Past; maintain moment value... Launch.

battle_erosion_20508_1.dlg:
Compress. Compress. Ignore steam reflux... cannot ignore.
Past corroded. Memory corroded.
User affected by temporal reflux, nngh... 
Comprehension... failure...

battle_awaken_20509_2.dlg: Awash in the yearning moonlight, I hew your throat!

battle_awaken_20509_3.dlg: I claim the breath that remains!

battle_awaken_20601_1.dlg: Let’s visit the world of wonders.

battle_awaken_20601_2.dlg:
The cleansing of all impermanence and detachment may be meaningless.
Still, I cast myself into that troubled world all the same.

battle_awaken_20602_1.dlg: I’ll tie you up just enough.

battle_awaken_20603_1.dlg: To bound over to the next world… Huzzah! Off we go!

battle_erosion_20603_1.dlg: Nothing says… that I must be located there… Heheh.

battle_awaken_20604_1.dlg: Tadaa~ Transformation complete! Hah, we've a boatload!

battle_erosion_20604_1.dlg: The seagulls... They keep crying and screaming away...!

battle_awaken_20605_1.dlg: It'll sting~ It won't come off once you're cut.

battle_erosion_20605_1.dlg: Filth nests inside me... so that they may be reborn as something useful.

battle_awaken_20606_1.dlg: A heart shaken by sorrow bursts... like this.

battle_erosion_20606_1.dlg: Cry with me... Let's cry until our bodies burst.

battle_awaken_20607_1.dlg: Run along the flow and voilà~ There you are!

battle_erosion_20607_1.dlg:
Hahah! Gotcha~! This is what happens when
you don't know your place and run away, fugitive.

battle_awaken_20608_1.dlg: With solemn grace, I accept this deserved punishment.

battle_awaken_20608_2.dlg:
With contemplation, I shall darken the clear skies above;
with my sacrifice, I shall exsanguinate my carnal blood upon this earth.

battle_erosion_20608_1.dlg:
The heavens have spoken: this tarnished, filthy body has no skies to rise to… 
Oh, all the fell things in this world, remain here with me for eternity!

battle_awaken_20609_1.dlg:
Faint lamplight spreads over the neatly folded paper;
a poem's brushstroke becomes a loong atop a dry inkstone.

battle_erosion_20609_1.dlg: A singular breath brings down the blue sky;

battle_awaken_20701_1.dlg: You’ll… get shoved in this bag too!

battle_awaken_20701_2.dlg: I... have to meet Catherine. And everything that stands in my way will...

battle_awaken_20701_3.dlg: Even if you are forgotten to the world... I'll get you back.

battle_awaken_20702_1.dlg: Alright, I’ll sear you down to your guts!

battle_awaken_20703_1.dlg: Kahahaha! I'll fry you... all the way to the heart!

battle_erosion_20703_1.dlg: It's my turn to torment you now... Need some shock in your system?!

battle_awaken_20704_1.dlg: One. Two. The weight of your Karma returns with each rumbling of the earth.

battle_erosion_20704_1.dlg: The wheel of samsara turns once. And you are forthwith no more. For that is existence. For that is I.

battle_awaken_20705_1.dlg: Hah, you'll make a fine gift!

battle_awaken_20706_1.dlg: I am bound to reign alone atop this solitary throne...

battle_erosion_20706_1.dlg: These strands bandage and shackle me... When shall I be released?!!

battle_awaken_20707_1.dlg:
Leg it, if you want. My scattering bullets...
...will turn your brain into fireworks no matter where you run.

battle_erosion_20707_1.dlg:
A single bullet ain't enough...
Until echoes of gunshots and plumes of smoke bury all that I've ever remembered...!

battle_awaken_20708_1.dlg: I ain't off balance—I was just swayin' this side to smack 'em even harder on the comeback!

battle_erosion_20708_1.dlg: You could've helped me... Before I fell apart...!

battle_awaken_20709_1.dlg:
Easy—halt. You've... gone and left the tour souvenir behind, haven't you?
Stay right where you are... I'll slot it in you now!

battle_erosion_20709_1.dlg:
Enjoyed your Town Tour, did you, dear gues—tosser?!
Goodbye, farewell. Farewell,
FarewellFarewellFarewellFarewell... Sod off!!

battle_awaken_20801_1.dlg: That bastard… has to be alive still.

battle_awaken_20801_2.dlg: This is how I will chart my own path…

battle_erosion_20802_1.dlg: Wheehee! I’ll enwrap it… enrapture it.

battle_awaken_20803_1.dlg: Though I can’t guide you… I can offer a warm embrace.

battle_erosion_20803_1.dlg: Do you see? My writhing struggle, hoping the world is cocooned in flames with me…

battle_erosion_20804_1.dlg: Must be here… Oh, was it that way?

battle_awaken_20805_1.dlg:
All hands, full speed toward where the lights flicker.
The waves... will lay waste to everything in our way.

battle_erosion_20805_1.dlg: To the sea, to the sea. All hands, abandon ship and descend. Into the flickering depths we sink.

battle_awaken_20806_1.dlg: Very good. Sit still and be gentle. Scarred meat isn't... tasty.

battle_erosion_20806_1.dlg:
Y-you suspected me, didn't you...?
Bastards harboring such evil thoughts must be...!

battle_awaken_20807_1.dlg: By the command of my master, I... will cleanse you from this place.

battle_erosion_20807_1.dlg: There's no end to this cleaning... You! Stop leaving your mess all over the manor!

battle_awaken_20808_1.dlg:
A monster? What are you... You've got to be hallucinating or something.
Haah. ... No one saw that, right?

battle_erosion_20808_1.dlg: Curiosity is a dangerous thing, you know... too much of it, and the darkness will eat you whole!

battle_awaken_20809_1.dlg:
Unfathomable Infinity. If your faith. Was emboldened.
You should have cast those foolish doubts from your heart!

battle_erosion_20809_1.dlg: No doubts. Engrave faith. Pray in the dark... Pray with obsession.

battle_awaken_20810_1.dlg: Don’t look away, for the waves… will carry you out of your element!

battle_erosion_20810_1.dlg: Rise from the long dark, journey with the torturous nightmare to your sea!

battle_awaken_20902_1.dlg: If fervent flames can thaw the heart…

battle_awaken_20903_1.dlg: Well, I can’t shiver in the cold forever.

battle_erosion_20903_1.dlg: Stay frozen… and there will be no pain.

battle_awaken_20904_1.dlg: It's pretty sticky... You won't dodge this!

battle_erosion_20904_1.dlg: Hmm... Ach, yuck. Not even worth turning into a pearl!

battle_awaken_20905_1.dlg: You will be executed... as it is written.

battle_erosion_20905_1.dlg: All shall be executed as it is written.

battle_awaken_20906_1.dlg:
I must be the only one to dance this beautiful dance...
So once I chop off your ankles...!

battle_erosion_20906_1.dlg:
Ahahaha! I'll carve it 'till it's sharp...
All for a more sanguine, luscious hue of red...!

battle_awaken_20907_1.dlg: Now, little teddy~ Dance after me! Ta-da!

battle_erosion_20907_1.dlg: Now, little Rodya. Hurt them with your own hands. Fuhu, ta-da!

battle_awaken_20908_1.dlg: Hang them, burn them. Reduce their bones to cinders.

battle_erosion_20908_1.dlg: Who will it be? Is it you, or... you? Which of you shall burn with more grace... I wonder?

battle_awaken_20909_1.dlg:
I know... Wasn't it tiring coming all the way here?
Why don't you stop for a moment and take a breather?
The sight alone will warm your heart.

battle_erosion_20909_1.dlg:
You look awfully busy... But really, you should take a breather.
Look! These little ones are itching to tag along with you.

battle_awaken_21001_1.dlg: If I can sever it by my own hands…

battle_erosion_21002_1.dlg: You, too, will be a live offering.

battle_awaken_21003_1.dlg: This is the u-ultimate…! Whoa, uaaahh…

battle_awaken_21004_1.dlg: I'll chop you down... along with the trees.

battle_erosion_21004_1.dlg: Should've watched your steps in the woods...!

battle_awaken_21005_1.dlg: Your weakness is written... Right here!

battle_awaken_21006_1.dlg: If only I could gather all the sorrow, all the tears together, and cry in their stead...

battle_awaken_21007_1.dlg:
Why don't you try impaling yourself with it, then.
Feel what it's like to have someone curse you...

battle_erosion_21007_1.dlg: Now that you're torn, I'll sew you up! Heheh... Get over here!

battle_awaken_21008_1.dlg: Earthbound I have become, but... to embrace you, I endure this endless descent.

battle_erosion_21008_1.dlg:
The earth has no punishment for your sins.
Shut your eyes, now. Accept the retribution of the heavens.

battle_awaken_21009_1.dlg:
I know it hurts, but please, stop struggling...!
I promise, nothing could make as fascinating music as a human can...
Nothing!

battle_erosion_21009_1.dlg:
This way, just a little closer... Hahah! Perfect!
That scream, weaving into a ninth chord! Such wondrous... harmony.

battle_awaken_21102_1.dlg: If this is to seize victory…

battle_awaken_21103_1.dlg: Karma shall find its way back to you, and rest atop your head.

battle_erosion_21103_1.dlg: Fall silent… As if there were no suffering in the first place…

battle_awaken_21104_1.dlg: I don't need... any pointless attention!

battle_awaken_21105_1.dlg: I'll stuff your futile wrath in this gift sack... and hurl it right back at your face.

battle_erosion_21105_1.dlg: Even crying, pouting kids... got the presents...!

battle_awaken_21106_1.dlg: How insipid... Must I deal with it myself?

battle_awaken_21107_1.dlg: Do not avert your eyes even for a moment, lest you be ensnared in an eternal wandering.

battle_erosion_21107_1.dlg: It's not there... not behind any of these doors... My path remains in shadows... my path is...!

battle_awaken_21108_1.dlg: It really is as you say; this is a magic bullet that will never miss.

battle_awaken_21108_2.dlg:
My bullet inevitably flies in the same direction, its trajectory preordained.
There are no coincidences.

battle_awaken_21108_3.dlg:
There's no going back when I've already come this far by firing the bullet.
Even if this road I walk is an inevitable path to inferno.

battle_awaken_21108_4.dlg:
Do not seek my mercy, for only desolation awaits
those who stand in my path.

battle_awaken_21108_5.dlg:
Remain unshaken. Grant silence to all that stands before you.
Follow the land horizon.

battle_awaken_21108_6.dlg:
The despairing heart is burnt black, never to fade away.
Only the shearing cold floods within.

battle_awaken_21108_7.dlg:
Though it was despair that I sought, the bullet's trajectory...
... is predetermined!

battle_erosion_21108_1.dlg: A bullet was fired, a magic bullet that will never miss.

battle_erosion_21108_2.dlg: Welcome this fate, for this bullet's flight will always strike true.

battle_erosion_21108_3.dlg:
As long as this bullet has been in my possession,
I have been overcome with an extreme sense of omnipotence.

battle_erosion_21108_4.dlg: No justice, no malice. Only a finger that pulls the trigger.

battle_erosion_21108_5.dlg:
Remain immutable. Follow the sea horizon;
weave the bullet through them all.

battle_erosion_21108_6.dlg: I'll be left alone in this inferno at the end of the road.

battle_erosion_21108_7.dlg:
Though I may lack the will to move forward...
... the bullet's forward-momentum cannot be stopped.

battle_awaken_21109_1.dlg: ... So you didn't trust me. I told you I'd play scissors!

battle_erosion_21109_1.dlg: Scissors beats rock. Teehee! That means you lose!

battle_awaken_21202_1.dlg: Listen, you sure you can stand after this?

battle_awaken_21203_1.dlg: How’s about I read you a tale?

battle_erosion_21203_1.dlg: Too late… They’ve all been captivated.

battle_awaken_21204_1.dlg: Alright, try enduring this... It'll fry you just enough to kill.

battle_erosion_21204_1.dlg: Muheheheheh... Are you the new test subject?

battle_awaken_21205_1.dlg: Can't say I've brought you a gift... Aha! Take this instead!

battle_erosion_21205_1.dlg: Hands off! ... Don't try to untangle these brambles. It's... better this way.

battle_awaken_21206_1.dlg: Allow me... to introduce you to this manor...

battle_erosion_21206_1.dlg: Butlers... Where are the stewards of this house? You must know... Lead me to them, now!

battle_awaken_21207_1.dlg:
What unfortunate, tragic children... 
I can do nothing but mourn for them.

battle_erosion_21207_1.dlg:
That faith is just a hollow wish, isn't it...?
Let it go, and sink gentle into the deep, restful night.

battle_awaken_21208_1.dlg: You saw a monster, huh...? Did it look anything like this, by any chance?!

battle_erosion_21208_1.dlg: Fear, horror, and anxiety. In the shadow beneath your bed lies... a monster!!

battle_awaken_21209_1.dlg: Don’t fear the absence of brilliance.
